ddls:
CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "obj_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "coll_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collection the object belongs to */,
  "coll_ord" INTEGER /* Order of the object within the collection */,
  "cls_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the classification category of the object */,
  "p_type" INTEGER /* Type of the object */,
  "p_code_type" INTEGER /* Code type of the object */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the object was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the object was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Physical location of the object */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the object (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the object */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the object */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the object */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the object has been logically deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obj_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_p_code_type FOREIGN KEY ("p_code_type") REFERENCES code_types ("code_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_cls_id FOREIGN KEY ("cls_id") REFERENCES classifications ("cls_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_p_type FOREIGN KEY ("p_type") REFERENCES object_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_coll_id FOREIGN KEY ("coll_id") REFERENCES collections ("coll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "coll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "coll_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the collection was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the collection was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Physical location of the collection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the collection (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the collection */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the collection */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the collection has been logically deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "cls_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "cls_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification */,
  "parent_cls_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent classification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the classification (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the classification */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the classification */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the classification has been logically deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cls_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_parent_cls_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_cls_id") REFERENCES classifications ("cls_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the object type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the object type (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the object type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the object type */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the object type has been logically deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_types_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_types" (
  "code_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code type */,
  "code_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the code type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the code type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the code type (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the code type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the code type */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the code type has been logically deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_types_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "obj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object that was changed */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the change occurred */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User who made the change */,
  "is_reverted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the change has been reverted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_history_obj_id FOREIGN KEY ("obj_id") REFERENCES objects ("obj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account has been logically deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the role (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the role */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the role has been logically deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "obj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the object */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the object was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_obj_id FOREIGN KEY ("obj_id") REFERENCES objects ("obj_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "obj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object the metadata belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metadata was last updated */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the metadata value (e.g., string, integer, date) */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the metadata is required for the object */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the metadata has been logically deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_metadata_obj_id FOREIGN KEY ("obj_id") REFERENCES objects ("obj_id")
)
